name: Trademark Usage
text: Subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement, the Licensor grants the Licensee a non-exclusive, non-transferable, royalty-free licence to use the Licensor's registered trademarks, trade names, and logos ('Licensed Marks') solely for the purpose of marketing and distributing the Licensed Products in the Territory during the term of this Agreement. The Licensee shall: (a) use the Licensed Marks only in the form and manner approved by the Licensor in writing; (b) include appropriate trademark notices (® or ™) as directed by the Licensor; (c) not register or attempt to register any trademark identical or confusingly similar to the Licensed Marks in any jurisdiction; and (d) promptly notify the Licensor of any infringement of the Licensed Marks of which it becomes aware. All goodwill generated by the Licensee's use of the Licensed Marks shall accrue solely to the benefit of the Licensor.
invalid_if: Trademark licence not registered with Trade Marks Registry where required
Licensee permitted to sublicense Licensed Marks without Licensor approval
No quality control provisions over use of Licensed Marks
title: Trademark Usage
